approved_control.objective: Migrate the cybernetic control chain to JSON-only official control facts.
approved_control.what_counts_as_done: All required JSON-only control migration steps have evidence, full tests pass, and verify_runtime_progress permits goal_achieved true.

required_steps.transition: JSON schemas exist for every official control file and runtime report/event type
using-control-json skill defines runtime JSON read/write and verifier discipline
guard and compiler use JSON run directory as official input and reject Markdown official inputs
orchestration and handoff prediction point to runtime.control.json, not runtime Markdown
runtime verifier checks progress JSONL, mainline evidence, final report, and verifier permission before achieved claims
Markdown control templates are deauthorized as official control facts and replaced by JSON examples
old accident classes are represented as JSON regressions
hot-path docs and skill instructions no longer teach old runtime goal files as official control input
actual JSON run directory validates through guard, runtime operation scripts, verifier, and compiler
full repository verification passes after the JSON-only migration
